---
title: "Initial Analysis"
format:
  typst: default
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

Openly available CCTV data:

- 2023 August
- 2023 September
- 2023 October
- 2023 November
- 2023 December
- 2024 January
- 2024 February
- 2024 March
- 2024 July
- 2024 August
- 2024 September
- 2024 December
- 2025 January
- 2025 February
- 2025 March

```{python}
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("../Data/Processed/06_With_Holidays.csv")

display(df)
```

Features:

```{python}
features=df.columns
features
```
Detect outliers
```{python}
df['Number of People'].describe()
```
